title: S10E02: The Name — Ahmad ibn Yusuf disclosed; CAVE-001 pre-mechanism source site confirmed
body: --findings Tyler receives the scholar's name (Ahmad ibn Yusuf, geographer, Rabat 1121 CE). Cave-001 confirmed as pre-mechanism source site — mechanism reads Stolas 7.83 (its own baseline) and cannot classify what it identifies as itself. Archive now addressed. TYLER-088, Camera Op Entry 81, Jiangshi Memo #068. Build 0104.
